name: Felt Double Hamper Charcoal - Brightroom™: Polyester, 6000 Volume, Adjustable, Open-Top, No Assembly Required
description:
This simple yet stylish Felt Double Hamper from Brightroom™ makes it a breeze to keep your house neat and tidy while easily storing and sorting laundry. Featuring an open top design with two built-in handles and a divider, this felt hamper makes it simple to toss in clothing, linens and more between laundry days, while keeping laundry separate for special loads of wash. With fabric made of 100% recycled polyester in a chic charcoal finish, you can keep it in a closet, laundry room or corner of a bedroom to help keep your laundry contained and easy to carry between washes.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
